topic: your phone is tracking you — here's how to stop it
hook: your phone is tracking you — here's how to stop it is overrated. I said it.

script_segments.text: your phone is tracking you — here's how to stop it is overrated. I said it.
script_segments.visual_direction: Lean in close. Text: 'HOT TAKE'. Intense eye contact.

script_segments.text: You don't need a degree for your phone is tracking you — here's how to stop it. You need 30 days of focused work.
script_segments.visual_direction: Deliver the take in one breath. Bold text overlay matches.

script_segments.text: [Hold eye contact. Don't blink. Let the silence do the work.]
script_segments.visual_direction: Hold eye contact. No blink. Let it land. Text: 'Fight me'.
